channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: It's getting worse again!!, 30th March
item.description:
Flytipping is about to get worse again! Also, the same property that had a water leak for most of last year has started leaking again - this will begin to smell foul and leave a green sludge, as well as erode away the tarmac to create more large potholes (which still haven't been repaired).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Madron Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dying tree, 30th March
item.description:
The tree has been slowly dying for 3/4 years, now looks terrible as most branches are dead and it needs to be out out of its misery. Any chance of removing it and have a new tree planted please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Goodhart Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked car with no registration plates, 30th March
item.description:
This vehicle is always parked here Illegally with no registration plates on the front or back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cherry Garden Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle doesn’t have registration plates and is always illegally parked here on a public walkway, 30th March
item.description:
This vehicle doesn’t have registration plates on the front or rear and is always illegally parked here on a public walkway. There should be a metal post cemented in the ground to prevent people from parking on this public walkway but the driver has removed it so he can illegally park here. Very dangerous, illegal and inconvenient for wheelchair users, Buggies and pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cherry Garden Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken chair, 30th March
item.description:
Chair has been here for a long time, not sure how long. At least a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Haddon Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of construction spoil dumped on street, 30th March
item.description:
Large amount of garden/construction waste dumped on public street outside of 321 Westmount Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs re-staking, 30th March
item.description:
Tree needs re-staking. Strap has snapped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London

item.title: Kingston House j/c Fountain House, 30th March

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th March
item.description:
The fly tipping at hensley point bradstock garages is getting worse its almost daily .i think residents who hold a parking permit should be able to have a key to gate so it can be locked and stop vans getting in to fly tip
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa left on pavement, 30th March
item.description:
A sofa has been left on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hervey Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southwark cleaning bags, 30th March
item.description:
Pile of Southwark cleaning bags next to the cycle hanger on the corner of Sutherland Square and Sutherland Walk SE17

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southwark Council Bags Flytipped, 30th March
item.description:
Southwark council street cleaners collected leaves and other street green waste into blue bags. These were left on the pavement. They have not been collected 3weeks later. I believe this is flytipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Councillor Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car parked for some time taking up limited street parking, 30th March
item.description:
Abandoned car parked for some time (couple of months) taking up limited street parking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 154, Harcourt Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 wheelie bins that no one owns, 30th March
item.description:
These bins have been in Franklin passage (Dickson Road end) for some time now and they do not belong to any resident in the Passage. Consequently, people dump all sorts of rubbish in them. So please remove the bins with the rubbish . Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Franklin Passage, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole needs repairing please, 30th March
item.description:
Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86-100, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th March
item.description:
A green food grate has been dumped in my front garden with stuff in it. Its on top of the tree stump.249a queens road peckham se15 2ng.this is upsetting me

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
